caption: Table 83. Document revision history
rows: Changed confidentiality level to public. Updated datasheet status to "production data". Modified ultra-low-power platform features on cover page. Changed number of ADC channels to 10. Removed LCD alternate functions and added note related to UFQFPN32 in Table 15: STM32L082xx pin definition. Added PA15 in Table 16: Alternate functions port A and PB3 in Table 17: Alternate functions port B. In Section 6: Electrical characteristics, updated notes related to values guaranteed by characterization. Updated f in Table 61: ADC characteristics. TRIG

Updated number of SPIs on cover page and in Table 1: Ultra-low- power STM32L082xx device features and peripheral counts. Changed minimum comparator supply voltage to 1.65 V on cover page. Added minimum DAC supply voltage on cover page. Added number of fast and standard channels in Section 3.11: Analog-to-digital converter (ADC). Updated Section 3.18.2: Universal synchronous/asynchronous receiver transmitter (USART) and Section 3.18.4: Serial peripheral interface (SPI)/Inter-integrated sound (I2S) to mention the fact that USARTs with synchronous mode feature can be used as SPI master interfaces. Added baudrate allowing to wake up the MCU from Stop mode in Section 3.18.2: Universal synchronous/asynchronous receiver transmitter (USART) and Section 3.18.3: Low-power universal asynchronous receiver transmitter (LPUART). Section 6.3.15: 12-bit ADC characteristics: – Table 61: ADC characteristics: Distinction made between V for fast and standard channels; DDA added note 1. Added note 4. related to R . ADC Updated f . TRIG Updated t and t . S CONV – Updated equation 1 description. – Updated Table 62: R max for f = 16 MHz for f = 16 MHz AIN ADC ADC and distinction made between fast and standard channels. Updated R and added Note 2. in Table 64: DAC characteristics. O Added Table 71: USART/LPUART characteristics.
Added WLCSP49 package, STM32L082CZ part number and corresponding features.

Memories and I/Os moved after Core in Features. Table 1: Ultra-low-power STM32L082xx device features and peripheral counts: changed number of USART for LQFP32/UFQFPN32 and added note 3. Removed column "I/O operation" from Table 2: Functionalities depending on the operating power supply range and added note related to GPIO speed. Updated V in Section 3.4.1: Power supply schemes. DD_USB In Section 4: Pin descriptions, renamed USB_OE into USB_NOE. In Section 5: Memory mapping, replaced memory mapping schematic by reference to the reference manual. Updated Figure 3: STM32L082xx WLCSP49 ballout Added mission profile compliance with JEDEC JESD47 in Section 6.2: Absolute maximum ratings. Updated minimum and maximum values of I/O weak pull-up equivalent resistor (R ) and weak pull-down equivalent resistor PU (R ) in Table 57: I/O static characteristics. PD Updated minimum and maximum values of NRST weak pull-up equivalent resistor (R ) in Table 60: NRST pin characteristics. PU Added note 2. related to the position of the external capacitor below Figure 24: Recommended NRST pin protection. Updated R in Table 61: ADC characteristics. AIN Updated Figure 29: 12-bit buffered/non-buffered DAC and added note below figure. Updated t maximum value for range 1 in Table 70: I2C analog filter AF characteristics. Removed Table 90: USART/LPUART characteristics. NSS timing waveforms updated in Figure 30: SPI timing diagram - slave mode and CPHA = 0 and Figure 31: SPI timing diagram - slave mode and CPHA = 1(1). Added reference to optional marking or inset/upset marks in all package device marking sections. Updated note below marking schematics.

Added UFQFPN48 package. Updated Arm logo and added Arm word mark notice in Section 1: Introduction. Removed Cortex logo. Updated Table 4: Functionalities depending on the working mode (from Run/active down to standby) to change I2C functionality to disabled in Low-power Run and Low-power Sleep modes. Updated V description in Section 3.4.1: Power supply DD_USB schemes. Changed PC14-OSC_IN into PC14-OSC32_IN in Figure 6: STM32L082xx UFQFPN32 pinout. Changed USARTx_RTS, USARTx_RTS_DE into USARTx_RTS/USARTx_DE, and LPUART1_RTS, LPUART1_RTS_DE into LPUART1_RTS/LPUART1_DE in Section 4: Pin descriptions and in all alternate function tables. Updated V and note 2. in Table 23: General operating DD_USB conditions. Removed R and R from Table 67: Comparator 1 10K 400K characteristics. Updated t maximum value for range 1 in Table 70: I2C analog filter AF characteristics. Updated paragraph introducing all package marking schematics to add the new sentence "The printed markings may differ depending on the supply chain". Added WLCSP49 package marking example. Updated Figure 43: UFQFPN32 – Outline and added note related to exposed pad; updated Table 81: UFQFPN32 – Mechanical data. Added LQFP32, UFQFPN32 package marking examples.

Added indication that patents apply to the devices in Section : Features. Added reference to the device errata sheet in Section 1: Introduction. Added note on reduced touch sensing sensitivity on PA4 and PA5 in Table 15: STM32L082xx pin definition. Replaced STM32L072xxx by STM32L082xxx in Table 15 title. Added recommendations of GPIO low- and high-level voltages in Section 6.3.13: I/O port characteristics. Added t and t Table 39: Low-power mode WUUSART WULPUART in wakeup timings. Updated V and V characteristics in Table 40: High-speed HSEH HSEL external user clock characteristics, as well as V and V LSEH LSEL characteristics in Table 41: Low-speed external user clock characteristics. Updated Table 53: EMI characteristics for fHCLK = 32 MHz. Updated Figure 23: I/O AC characteristics definition. Updated Figure 25: ADC accuracy characteristics and Figure 26: Typical connection diagram using the ADC. Updated Section 7.2: UFQFPN48 package information, Section 7.3: LQFP32 package information and Section 7.4: UFQFPN32 package information. Added Section 9: Important security notice. Corrected revision 2 date.
